programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Todo depende del cristal
programme.desc: Frank se enfrenta a una periodista que se niega a revelar su fuente, aunque admite haber cometido un asesinato. Danny se empareja con un adolescente problemático en un programa de la policía para ayudarlo a tomar mejores decisiones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Revancha
programme.desc: Un sospechoso admite haber matado a un chef de un programa de reality show en su restaurante. Danny y Maria creen que está asumiendo la culpa por alguien. Frank enfrenta un dilema moral con su amigo, el senador Ted McCreary.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Nuevas reglas
programme.desc: Cuando alguien cercano a Frank es asesinado, Frank ordena que todos se involucren para atrapar al asesino. Danny y Maria visitan a Mario Hunt, un conocido miembro de una pandilla peligrosa, para trabajar en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El arte de la guerra
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro de la familia Reagan es tiroteado, Danny intenta rastrear al miembro de la pandilla responsable sin dejar que sus emociones lo dominen. También debe ser creativo para atraer a testigos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los cuerpos de dos víctimas de asesinato se encuentran en una comunidad de West Virginia, el UAC descubre una disputa latente desde hacía tiempo entre dos familias, y se debe investigar cuál de ellos podría ser responsable de la muerte.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble identidad
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de un marine y descubre más cosas sobre su vida de las que nadie habría imaginado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Jurisdicción
programme.desc: El equipo descubre sorprendentes similitudes entre ellos y sus homólogos del CGIS cuando aparece muerto un buzo de la Marina que buscaba un tesoro hundido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Poder absoluto
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan a un posible asesino en serie que le envía un mensaje escalofriante a Danny, y Erin juega con la idea de postularse para el puesto de juez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La historia perfecta
programme.desc: Cuando el reportero Lorenzo Colt (Zachary Booth) es atacado mientras llevaba equipo de la policía de Nueva York en un paseo junto con Jamie y Eddie, Frank pone a Danny y Baez a la caza del tirador que puede estar buscando a otros miembros de la fuerza.

programme.title: El diario de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: La soltera Bridget Jones decide cambiar su vida y escribir sus pensamientos, opiniones e inseguridades en un diario. El resultado es una divertida crónica de sus aventuras en este clásico de la modernidad romántica.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón
programme.desc: Después de seis semanas perfectas con su novio Mark Darcy, el pícaro Daniel Cleaver vuelve, afirmando ser un hombre reformado. ¿Encontrará Bridget una forma de hacer que el amor perdure para siempre?

programme.title: El bebé de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: Regresa Bridget Jones inesperadamente embarazada y sin saber la identidad del padre del bebé. Los ganadores del Óscar Renée Zellweger y Colin Firth se unen a Patrick Dempsey en el siguiente capítulo de la vida divertida y sorpresiva de Bridget.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: El diario de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: La soltera Bridget Jones decide cambiar su vida y escribir sus pensamientos, opiniones e inseguridades en un diario. El resultado es una divertida crónica de sus aventuras en este clásico de la modernidad romántica.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón
programme.desc: Después de seis semanas perfectas con su novio Mark Darcy, el pícaro Daniel Cleaver vuelve, afirmando ser un hombre reformado. ¿Encontrará Bridget una forma de hacer que el amor perdure para siempre?

programme.title: Una Eva y dos Adanes
programme.desc: Marilyn Monroe, Tony Curtis y Jack Lemmon protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia clásica. Dos músicos que han sido testigos de un tiroteo entre bandas huyen a Florida… disfrazados de Josephine y Daphne, miembros de una banda femenina de jazz.

programme.title: Vaselina
programme.desc: ¡Vaselina es lo que quieres! Vuelve a la preparatoria con Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), el líder de la banda de chicos malos T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), y un reparto para rocanrolear.

programme.title: El Quijote
programme.desc: Rocinante tiene un romance del que sale golpeado, al igual que su dueño. Don Quijote y Sancho llegan a una venta donde son nuevamente golpeados y Sancho queda mantado por que Don Quijote no quiere pagarle al ventero.

programme.title: La agonía de ser madre
programme.desc: Gravemente enferma, una mujer pide a Dios que le dé vida para solucionar todos los problemas que provocó el alcoholismo de su esposo y sacar a su familia adelante.

programme.title: Después de la tormenta
programme.desc: Rosa y su marido, Melchor, trabajan como encargados del faro en la Isla de Lobos. Cuando Melchor sale a navegar junto a su gemelo durante una tormenta, solo un hermano regresa, afirmando que es Rafael.

programme.title: Rosario
programme.desc: Una mujer mata accidentalmente a su marido mientras actuaba en una obra de teatro.

programme.title: La agonía de ser madre
programme.desc: Gravemente enferma, una mujer pide a Dios que le dé vida para solucionar todos los problemas que provocó el alcoholismo de su esposo y sacar a su familia adelante.

programme.title: El talentoso señor Ripley
programme.desc: Tom es un joven que cree que es mejor ser alguien de mentira a ser un verdadero Don Nadie. Un constructor naval millonario lo contrata para viajar a Italia y traer de vuelta a su hijo playboy.

programme.title: El cuerpo del delito
programme.desc: Tras una noche de pasión desenfrenada, Rebecca Carlson (Madonna) será juzgada por asesinato. Ahora está en manos de su abogado (Willem Dafoe) demostrar su inocencia, aunque el camino hacia la verdad tiene tantas curvas como su seductora cliente.

programme.title: Atracción fatal
programme.desc: Michael Douglas interpreta a Dan, un abogado neoyorquino quien tiene un encuentro amoroso con la seductora Alex Forrest cuando su esposa no está. Dan luego termina el amorío por considerarlo un error, pero Alex no quiere ser ignorada...

programme.title: La prueba
programme.desc: Los ganadores del Óscar Gwyneth Paltrow y Anthony Hopkins protagonizan la historia de una joven atormentada por el pasado de su padre y la sombra de su futuro. Basada en la obra ganadora del Pulitzer, Proof presenta a Jake Gyllenhaal y Hope Davis.

programme.title: El talentoso señor Ripley
programme.desc: Tom es un joven que cree que es mejor ser alguien de mentira a ser un verdadero Don Nadie. Un constructor naval millonario lo contrata para viajar a Italia y traer de vuelta a su hijo playboy.

programme.title: Desapareció una noche
programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.title: Babel (ESP)
programme.desc: Del aclamado director Alejandro González Iñárritu (Amores Perros, 21 Gramos) llega el tercer filme de su trilogía, Babel, una película aplaudida por la crítica y de una gran emotividad sobre las barreras que separan a la humanidad.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate (LAS)
programme.desc: Roman Polanski dirige y Johnny Depp protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural sobre un vendedor de libros raros que descubre un manuscrito demoníaco.

programme.title: Valkiria
programme.desc: Una dramatización del asesinato y complot político del 20 de julio de 1944 por oficiales del ejército alemán renegados desesperados contra Adolf Hitler durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Cuando los hermanos se encuentran
programme.desc: Tom Cruise interpreta a un comerciante de ruedas egocéntrico que descubre que tiene un hermano autista (Dustin Hoffman) y lo lleva a un viaje inolvidable por todo el país en esta histérica, profunda y conmovedora ganadora del Oscar® a la Mejor Película.

programme.title: Días de trueno
programme.desc: Tim Daland descubre a Cole y lo pone en el equipo liderado por el legendario Harry Hogge para ir por la Copa NASCAR en el Daytona 500. Un choque casi acaba con la carrera de Cole y debe recurrir a una hermosa doctora para recuperar el valor.

programme.title: Minority Report: sentencia previa
programme.desc: Minority Report es sobre un policía del futuro que trabaja en una división del departamento de policía arrestando asesinos antes de que cometan crímenes, gracias a una avanzada tecnología de premoniciones.

programme.title: Ojos de serpiente
programme.desc: En Atlantic City, un intento de asesinato lleva a un detective (Nicolas Cage) a investigar un caso de homicidio con 14.000 posibles sospechosos y una conspiración mortal en la que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Las Caras Del Diablo 2
programme.desc: Cuando una investigación compleja involucra a un ex ministro y su familia, el detective Guzmán no tiene otra opción más que liberar de la prisión a su compañero, el inspector Pedro Ramírez, para resolver el caso.

programme.title: Contrarreloj
programme.desc: Un ex ladrón busca desesperadamente a su hija que ha sido secuestrada y encerrada en el maletero de un taxi. Protagonizada por Nicolas Cage y Malin Akerman.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis ex-militares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: Los últimos caballeros
programme.desc: Clive Owen protagoniza esta épica aventura del arte de pelear con espadas, un guerrero caído que lucha para vengar a su deshonrado maestro (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: El núcleo
programme.desc: La Tierra deja de rotar por un cambio en la temperatura del centro del planeta. Para solucionarlo, los astronautas deberán viajar al centro, y detonar una bomba nuclear antes de que el centro se sobrecaliente y destruya toda la vida en la superficie.

programme.title: Lo imposible
programme.desc: Nominada al Oscar (Mejor Actriz, Naomi Watts), este apasionante drama cuenta la increíble historia real de la supervivencia de una familia frente a probabilidades imposibles.

programme.title: Naturaleza desatada: terremoto
programme.desc: La familia de un ingeniero está en el camino directo del peligro después de que un temblor masivo dañe gravemente una planta nuclear rusa.

programme.title: Rugrats la película: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Con el nacimiento de su nuevo hermano Dylan, Tommy Pickles sabía que las cosas iban a cambiar, pero nunca esperó que ser un hermano pudiera ser tal aventura.

programme.title: La invención de Hugo Cabret
programme.desc: Situada en París en 1930, un huérfano que vive entre los muros de una estación de trenes, se encuentra envuelto en un misterioso suceso que involucra a su padre y a un autómata.

programme.title: El núcleo
programme.desc: La Tierra deja de rotar por un cambio en la temperatura del centro del planeta. Para solucionarlo, los astronautas deberán viajar al centro, y detonar una bomba nuclear antes de que el centro se sobrecaliente y destruya toda la vida en la superficie.

programme.title: Héroe
programme.desc: Aclamada por la crítica y amada por el público, Jet Li, Maggie Cheung y Donnie Yen protagonizan una epopeya llena de acción, que fue nominada al Oscar y el Globo de Oro, donde un intrépido guerrero desafía a un imperio para unir a una nación.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policía? 2 1/2
programme.desc: Frank Drebin (Leslie Nielsen) adora el misterio. ¿Por qué estamos aquí? ¿Hay vida después del sexo? Sí, aborda los grandes temas, y el más grande es detener a Quentin Hapsburg (Robert Goulet) en su plan para destruir el medio ambiente.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policia? 33 1/3: el insulto final
programme.desc: La noche de los Óscar(r). ¿Puede alguien echar ese zoquete? ¡Esperen! No es un zoquete cualquiera, es el Tte. Frank Drebin. ¡Y se coló para detener un atentado terrorista!

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: "Cocodrilo" Dundee II
programme.desc: Justo cuando el australiano excéntrico comienza a acostumbrarse a la vida en la ciudad de Nueva York, Dundee y su hermosa novia (Linda Kozlowski) son blanco de muerte de una pandilla de feroces traficantes de drogas.

programme.title: Los Super
programme.desc: Cristina, ex campeona olímpica y madre soltera, Belisario, un buscavidas ambulante, y Benito, un radio técnico con aires de inventor, se convertirán, tras la ola de criminalidad circundante en su barrio, en unos guardianes de la justicia.

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: El periodista, la leyenda de Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: En el mundo de los noticieros de los setenta, Ron Burgundy y su equipo son los líderes en San Diego. Todo marcha muy bien para los chicos hasta que ​la reportera estrella Veronica Corningstone llega para cambiar las cosas

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: 3 Bellezas
programme.desc: Perla es madre de tres hijos: Carolina, Stefania y Salvador. Está obsesionada con convertir a una de sus hijas en reina de belleza y cumplir su propio sueño de infancia. Pero su deseo y obsesión fomentan la competencia entre sus hijas desde pequeña.

programme.title: Sin Muertos No Hay Carnaval
programme.desc: Un hombre rico intenta desalojar 250 familias que están ocupando las tierras que heredó. El líder de estas familias está dispuesto a negociar, pero la disputa entre ambos podría ser sangrienta.

programme.title: Cara o sello
programme.desc: Carlos Mendoza es un policía honesto. Cuando no acepta un soborno y encarcela a los culpables, despierta la ira de un narcotraficante local, que secuestra a su familia y lo hace elegir entre su familia, su carrera y su compañero.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Las ruinas
programme.desc: "The Ruins" sigue a un grupo de amigos que se ven atrapados en una lucha brutal de supervivencia después de visitar una remota excavación arqueológica en la selva mexicana donde descubren un ser mortal entre las ruinas.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: La conspiración del diablo
programme.desc: Un culto satánico roba la Sábana Santa de Turín para fines malvados.

programme.title: Final Girl
programme.desc: Veronica está entrenando para ser una asesina y un grupo de chicos que la llevan al bosque con intenciones de asesinarla a ella, se encuentran con esta sorpresa. Serán ellos su presa.

programme.title: Perturbados
programme.desc: Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) le advierte al recién llegado Steve (James Marsden) sobre el Blue Ribbons, un club de estudiantes robóticos y perfectos que dominan la escuela. Cuando Gavin se vuelve perfecto, Steve y Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigan.

programme.title: Encubrimiento
programme.desc: Una policía investiga el asesinato de un compañero y se enfrenta a un espíritu maligno que acosas a los policías de su unidad. Pronto descubre el siniestro secreto sobre el encubrimiento de un tiroteo en contra de un joven desarmado.

programme.title: Scream. Grita antes de morir
programme.desc: Luego de una serie de muertes misteriosas, un grupo de fanáticos de películas de terror se vuelven el blanco de un asesino enmascarado en este thriller exitoso del director Wes Craven, que reinventó el género del terror.

programme.title: The Kentuckian
programme.desc: Eli Wakefield (Burt Lancaster) and his son are Kentucky adventurers longing for life on the Texas frontier. They learn, however, that their greatest challenge lies not in the uncharted wilderness, but in the people they meet along the way.

programme.title: Pack Train
programme.desc: Gene Autry sets out to aid frontier settlers, threatened by a shortage of food and medicine. When storekeepers divert the supplies to gold miners, Gene and Smiley Burnette must ride to the rescue.

programme.title: Saginaw Trail
programme.desc: Gene Autry is sent to investigate the murders of settlers with the help of Smiley Burnette and two young homesteaders. Gene soon discovers that rich fur trader is behind the staged Indian raids.

programme.title: John Wayne: Guns Along The Trail
programme.desc: A government agent goes undercover in a traveling medicine show to infiltrate a gang of counterfeiters. In Vibrant Color!

programme.title: Valdez Is Coming
programme.desc: In this rousing Western, when a greedy rancher causes the death of an innocent man, former sheriff Bob Valdez (Burt Lancaster) orders him to provide financial support for the widow. But when he refuses, Valdez vows to exact justice at any cost!

programme.title: God Forgives, I Don't

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is the inside story of selecting this year's Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders squad, with all the emotion and drama as thousands of women hope to make the team. After the best rookies are chosen to join the returning veterans,

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is the inside story of selecting this year's Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders squad, with all the emotion and drama as thousands of women hope to make the team. After the best rookies are chosen to join the returning veterans,

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After the best rookies are chosen to join the returning veterans, we follow the girls beyond the first game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Cowboys Stadium in Arlington, Texas is once again the venue for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tensions run high for the 69 new girls as the 18 returning DCC veterans join the competition for a coveted invitation to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begins tonight at Valley Ranch! The stress for the newly selected training camp candidates is evident as they struggle to re-arrange their schedules and secure new living arrangements in Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's two weeks into training camp, and Kelli and Judy are fixing to make their first cuts. This week's rehearsals are important for all the girls as they are expected to master the world-famous DCC kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week three of training camp and the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC "Makeovers." They're given a new look with a hair and make-up revamp and are transformed in the DCC mold.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tonight's rehearsal starts with a big bang when DCC Technical Director Kitty Carter makes a surprise visit to Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's a tense time for all and Training Camp Candidates who are not DCC ready will be exposed at the first and only field rehearsal on the Cowboys Stadium turf.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It has all come down to the final night of training camp. Tonight, dreams will be made or broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In this two-hour season premiere of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team, 600 hopeful candidates arrive at Cowboys Stadium for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp opens and many of the new candidates have had to uproot their lives and move to Dallas with no guarantee of making it through Training Camp to become a Dallas Cowboy Cheerleader.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In week three of training camp, the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC makeover. Under the scrutiny of Kelli Finglass, new hairstyles and makeup applications give the girls the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Final Adios
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final 2 men to pack their bags because they're goin' to Playa Car, Mexico for an exotic getaway!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Don't Threaten Me with a Good Time
programme.desc: Bret Michaels, lead singer of rock band Poison, welcomes 25 young ladies to his rocker lair in the hopes of finding that one special girl he can call his own.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Talk Dirty to Me
programme.desc: With 16 girls all fighting for Bret's affection, tensions are run high and alliances are formed as the ladies try to eliminate each other from the competition for Bret's heart, it's “Good Girls” versus “Bad Girls”.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Motocross
programme.desc: Bret challenges the twelve remaining girls to put the pedal to the metal in a motocross relay race, as they learn to ride, they fall, nearly run people over, and even lose an acrylic nail or two.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Riff it Good
programme.desc: Bret wants a woman with a creative side, so he splits the remaining 10 women in teams of 2 for a music challenge, where the girls write lyrics to one of Bret's tracks then perform the song on stage.

programme.title: Rock of Love: First Annual Bret's Mudbowl
programme.desc: Eight girls remain and Bret wants to see who's willing to get down-n-dirty for him in the First Annual Bret's Mudbowl!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Tour Bus Challenge
programme.desc: The next test is The Tour Bus Challenge where the ladies compete in various challenges all relating to the life on the road, the winner getting a solo date.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Becky and her brother Luke’s relationship is very strained and even with her faith as strong as it is, she can't bring herself to forgive him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya can’t sleep. She’s having nightmares about Miles’ safety, and they’re becoming all too familiar.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoë receives texts from an unknown number, threatening that they know the people behind the Power Squad’s scandalous fundraising initiative.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is committed to keeping Becky happy but his situation with Clare has his attention divided.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mr. Simpson calls an assembly to address the offending fundraising website.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi's fundraising scandal threatens to ruin Frankie's relationship with her father.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Alexa's parents won't let her have a party, Lucy offers to host one instead, since her parents are going away.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: The third term at Degrassi Junior High ends with a bang. Wheels passes algebra, but Spike is not so lucky.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Stephanie uses her new-found sexuality to campaign for the school presidency, her best friend questions her motivation and her methods. Meanwhile, Stephanie's younger brother Arthur is having difficulty adjusting to grade seven.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Voula disobeys her Old World father and sneaks out to the school dance. But when Stephanie gets too drunk to deliver her speech, Voula has to take over, risking exposure of her deception.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Feeling unfairly treated by Mr. Raditch, Yick puts his name on an old paper of Stephanie's to test his teacher's response. Meanwhile, Joey sells phony drugs to Melanie and Kathleen.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Rick, the school tough guy, is a loner who rarely speaks to anyone. When Joey visits Rick's home, he is horrified to discover that his new friend's bruises are inflicted by his own father. Joey wants to help but doesn’t want to betray Rick's confidence.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Responding to sexist taunts, the girls' swim team challenges the boys' soccer team to a battle of the sexes. But when star swimmer Melanie gets teased about her first bra, she pulls out of the race.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Whispered stories about Caitlin's favorite teacher, Ms. Avery, hint that she is a lesbian. Troubled by the accusations and by doubts about her own sexuality, Caitlin confronts Ms. Avery, who helps her understand that rumors never tell the whole story.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mr. Hollingsworth’s campaign is in its final stretch, and the stress has him even more tense than usual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi is now in the hands of a new, strict Administrator which means new, strict rules.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Winston is set to play the lead in his musical but is not pleased that Lola could star opposite him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Frankie’s birthday, and she’s going to celebrate it, Hollingsworth style -- with a Gatsby party!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe is facing jail time following the fundraising scandal

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky has feelings for Jonah, but she isn't sure what to do with them.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya has someone on her mind, and is questioning the house rules Mrs. Matlin has set.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Prom is fast approaching, but Clare is MIA from committee meetings.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of `Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan discovers a series of anomalies in Tutankhamun's burial, and spots that the faces on his coffins and canopic jars do not match that of the famous golden mask. Raksha looks at Seti's tomb, which shows how hurried Tutankhamun's was in comparison.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: A Chinese Odyssey: Part 1 - Pandora's Box
programme.desc: A Monkey King is reincarnated in the un human form as Joker, a highwayman oblivious to his original identity and the fact that 500 years earlier, he and his master, the Longevity Monk, were punished and made to stay human.

programme.title: A Chinese Odyssey: Part 2 - Cinderella
programme.desc: The convoluted continuation of the adventures of the time-traveling, now-human Monkey King, who attempts to fulfill his divine destiny.

programme.title: A Chinese Ghost Story [Cantonese-Language Version]
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck, a debt collector has no other choice than to spend the night in a haunted temple, where he encounters a ravishing female ghost and later battles to save her soul from the control of a wicked tree demon.

programme.title: A Chinese Ghost Story II
programme.desc: A Chinese Ghost Story II is a 1990 Hong Kong romantic comedy-horror film directed by Ching Siu-tung and produced by Tsui Hark.

programme.title: A Chinese Ghost Story III
programme.desc: The Swordsman Yen and Leslie Cheung characters are replaced by a Buddhist Abbot and disciple (Tony Leung). Jacky Cheung also pops up again, this time as a money-grabbing swordsman with a neat bag of tricks.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this episode, the decade-old murder of a young Texas housewife is investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Theo spreads his focus too thin, leading his teammates to question his effectiveness in battle.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Thanks to Carnisoar's training, Jarrod has become more ruthless than ever. Camille is pushed aside for the last time, and thanks to some advice from Lily, decides to get a new master.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey anxiously awaits the arrival of his second master, but RJ begins to feel forgotten as a result. It gets worse for him when the master of the Shark technique arrives, and turns out to be his estranged father, Master Finn!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After another victorious battle against Camille's monsters, the Rangers feel they are unstoppable. RJ warns them about being overconfident. He tells them to train on their basic stances.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With RJ captured, the Rangers must travel to the spirit world to find the last 3 remaining masters. Theo, Lily, and Casey must face their own childhood fears in order to pass their test.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Everyone is still making fun of Lily for being too nice. After a battle with Porcupongo, Lily is fed up with being so nice and shows her bad side. Lily becomes a rude customer at JKP and refuses to help the other Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After his last battle with Dai Shi, RJ has major problems controlling his animal spirit. He turns into a werewolf and becomes a big threat to anyone around him. RJ learns to lean on his friends and not run away from them when he has a problem.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey really has grown up from being a cub at Pai Zhuq. He's taken initiative and stepped up to being the leader of the group. But now with RJ as a Ranger, things are a little different. Casey feels like a cub all over again.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Grizzaka sends an evil spirit to cause trouble between RJ and his animal spirit again. The hero in RJ causes him to save Flit. RJ tells the spy to go home but Flit tells of his own curse.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Dominic was sent out by Master Mao to find purpose for his life. He finds out that RJ and the others are really Power Rangers and he wants to join them. He now knows that this is his purpose in life.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Jarrod has found the Rhino Nexus. All he needs is the Control Dagger key to tap into the power. Dominic is startled by a dream of Master Mao telling him to protect the Control Dagger as it holds the key to his destiny.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With Control Dagger in hand, Dai Shi aims to unlock the Nexus for himself. The Overlords refuse to let such power fall into the hands of the Rangers or Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts were a notorious force in the Beast Wars. The crystal eyes hold the power to bring back these Phantom Beasts. Our heroes must protect these eyes before Dai Shi or the Overlords resurrect such evil beasts.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts have been brought back to life. Dai Shi has them prove their loyalty by capturing the three masters. The Phantom Beasts capture the masters and use the masters to create the Spirit Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts control the masters and call forth the Spirit Rangers. They look and fight exactly like Power Rangers. Our heroes are in for a real fight as they face the spirits of their own masters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Spirit Rangers could be the end of our heroes if something isn't done. RJ takes the risk of destroying his father. Trusting his instincts, he finds that his dad was prepared if this should happen.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Rangers get sucked into a cheesy game show about the past season. Camille hosts the game show and a wrong answer could result in being cancelled!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Whiger steals some of Casey's Tiger spirit. Pleased, Dai Shi becomes the Phantom Beast King. He makes Camille a Phantom Beast General. Evil battles it out with the Rangers stronger than ever.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Whiger was only able to steal the Tiger Spirit from Casey, but not destroy Casey. For his failure, Dai Shi strips him of his power and he is to fade away. Casey shows his kindness to Whiger even though they were just battling.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Camille steals a cloning formula from Maryl. The monkeys will duplicate and Camille's plan just might work. Scorch and Snapper plot to ruin her plan. They don't like how Dai Shi favors her.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The day has arrived for the three to get their master stripes. Lily and Theo pass the test to become masters. Casey does not. He wanders off to think about his loss and comes across Jarrod saving Camille from Dai Shi's monsters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Nobody believes him, but Casey knows that Jarrod still lives inside of Dai Shi. He goes off on his own to save Jarrod. In an epic battle between Dai Shi and Casey, Jarrod manages to break free of Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: A new Beast War is about to begin as Dai Shi collects more fear. Dai Shi opens up a vortex and resurrects all his fallen warriors. Greatly outnumbered, the Rangers do their best to battle evil.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: The Venjix Computer Network is attempting to conquer and lay ruin to the entire planet, and the human race has retreated into the environmentally shielded domed city of Corinth to protect itself from destruction.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: As Venjix grows stronger, it becomes clear that the Rangers need more than three operators to defend the city. Summer suggests that Dillon be the new Black Ranger, but with him part-machine and part-human, no one knows what side he's really on.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Dillon goes through a series of tests to see if he even is Ranger material, but the real test comes when he is faced with the choice of seeking out his past or helping the Rangers as promised.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: When Ziggy is charged with finding the new Green Ranger, he finds the perfect candidate in Tenaya 7, until he realizes she's a machine working for Venjix!

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: When Dillon struggles to activate the invincibility mode of his suit, he challenges Dr. K to come out from behind her protective screen.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Ziggy's recruitment as Ranger Green is put into question when parts of his shady past are revealed. Should the Rangers work with someone who is hated by all seven of Corinth's cartels?

programme.title: Canadian Bacon
programme.desc: Falling approval ratings and a sagging economy, cause a desperate U.S. president to turn America against its most unlikely enemy, Canada. A Niagara Falls sheriff and his band of misfit deputies invade Canada leaving the President's plans in shambles.

programme.title: George Carlin: Complaints & Grievances
programme.desc: In Complaints & Grievances, George Carlin’s 12th HBO comedy special, taped at the Beacon Theater in New York on November 17, 2001 (ten weeks after 9/11), Carlin casts his usual jaundiced eye on America and its inhabitants.

programme.title: George Carlin: It's Bad for Ya

programme.title: George Carlin: Jammin' in New York

programme.title: Broad City

programme.title: Broad City

programme.title: Broad City

programme.title: Broad City
programme.desc: Abbi and Ilana list their apartments on B&B-NYC to make some extra cash.

programme.title: Broad City
programme.desc: Ilana's parents come to the city for their 30th anniversary, but Abbi and Ilana find it hard to celebrate when they both experience relationship problems.

programme.title: Broad City
programme.desc: Abbi and Ilana are going on a trip, but getting to the airport proves to be much harder than they expected.

programme.title: Broad City

programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: Southern muriqui, Dora, takes her first steps away from her mom, Mimi; exploring spider monkey troop dynamics and tail-hanging technique.

programme.title: Dark Side of Crocs
programme.desc: The story of some of the most impressive creatures in the world, two Nile crocodiles, living together in the African river.

programme.title: Hot life in Africa
programme.desc: Get to know the savannah's master of camouflage and a shade-making squirrel.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Wildebeest battle for herd hierarchy, meerkats live the thug life, floppy fish fight it out on land and locusts give up their vegetarian ways in a frenzy of cannibalism; it all happens on the wild and wide-open landscape of South Africa.

programme.title: Siberia's Wild Year
programme.desc: Only the hardiest animals are capable of carving out a life in Siberia. From the ice-covered shores of the north, across miles of barren tundra, to the depths of the taiga forest, animals must face incredible challenges and fight for survival.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: The summer solstice drives macaques into cool water and makes cranes dance on the chilly plateau.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Discover how scientists are working to restore and protect the Galapagos; witness penguin health checks, tortoise tagging and battles against invasive species, which are building a sustainable future for this delicate, one-of-a-kind ecosystem.

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: Family is everything, at least to a good number of animals; many species live in families, clans or groups; the survival of each individual depends on the family, and the family depends on the union of all its components.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: A lost Stork pack puppy; Manzi pups are finding their place in the hierarchy, figuring out neighbor friends and foes; Julz goes on a search mission for the missing Kakuli pack in the desolate Badlands.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: The Manzi dogs dodge a leopard while they treat themselves to a stolen feast; there is no such luck for the Kakuli pack on the hunt, as they're foiled by a puku antelope; Julz and Simon find the Stork pack and retreat from charging elephants.

programme.title: Hungry Games: Alaska's Big Bear Challenge
programme.desc: An icy October storm complicates the race to the finish line; Big Boi bounces after a stumble before tragedy hits QuadMom; fan fave BoldFace hits her stride despite her clingy kid, Raccoon.

programme.title: Parents In The Wild
programme.desc: Reproduction is the key to species conservation; exploring how the aim of all animal parents is to give their offspring a good start in life.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Dangerous creatures lurk not only on land, but also in the water. A look into the depths of the oceans and tracks in raging mountain rivers and murky waters to the most frightening killer in the water.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Cockatoos and platypuses inspire new careers; a shared trauma bonds a human and an elephant for life; George the turkey vulture gets playful; a farewell to human-raised kangaroos.

programme.title: Malawi Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: Seeing the release of pythons and monkeys.

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo viaja sin querer en una máquina del tiempo. / Bob Esponja y Arenita pelean karate en todos los lugares y Bob debe evitar pelear en el Crustaceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se sale de sus sueños y visita los sueños de sus amigos. / Bob Esponja enferma de peste y Patricio trata de curarlo para evitar que Arenita lo lleve con el Doctor.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Arenita planean darle un hermoso regalo a Patricio en el día de San Valentín. / Bob Esponja juega con un trozo de papel que quiere Calamardo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo reúne a Bob Esponja y Patricio para buscar el tesoro escondido del holandés volador. / Bob y Patricio toman un autobús que los deja atrapados en una ciudad muy extraña, llamada Fondo de Roca.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Arenita quiere volver a Texas, pero Bob Esponja y Patricio tratan de evitarlo. / Plankton intenta enseñarle a Bob Esponja a ser malo como él.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo se estremece cuando ve que es el día de los inocentes, Bob Esponja hace bromas en el día de los inocentes. / Bob Esponja saca la espátula de Neptuno, pero Neptuno lo reta al no creer que el la sacó.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio van a un lugar donde hay muchos anzuelos y ellos juegan con los anzuelos sin saber que en verdad son muy peligrosos. / Bob Esponja gana un concurso y gana la trompa de alarma de Triton y Chico Percebe.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja consigue un empleo en el Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Bob Esponja usa una aspiradora para quitar una almeja de su jardín. / Bob conoce una ardilla llamada Arenita.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja construye un puesto para hacer burbujas. / Bob Esponja rompe sus pantalones y aprovecha para ser gracioso.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Revelations abound as the true nature of the Wano clan and their relationship with the Minks is revealed! Momonosuke's role is greater than any had imagined! But even more shocking - the visage of Raizo the Ninja!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mysteries of ninjutsu enthrall the Straw Hats as Raizo, the implausible ninja, makes his true powers known! Meanwhile, a mysterious artifact points the way towards the end of the Grand Line!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of the Ponegliffs is revealed - their true significance, and the story of their creation, leads closer to the Straw Hats than they might have imagined!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: More mysteries of the Kozuki Clan are revealed - and the samurai propose an alliance to help topple Kaido! But Luffy's response will shock the crew... and force the young daimyo to take responsibility!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dogstorm and Cat Viper share their story of being on the journey with Oden and Roger but are interrupted by Nami who is concerned about the sea route. Meanwhile, Jack is plotting to bring down the Mokomo Dukedom again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plans are set! The Straw Hats divide and conquer, one group heading to save Sanji, the others to the Land of Wano! But in the final moments before their departure, the tremendous elephant island begins to quake!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After being aggressively attacked by Jack's fleet, the monstrous Zunesha comes to life and beckons to those on its back! But can the Straw Hats understand its cry? And realize in time what the elephant island needs from them?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the skirmish with Jack now over, the Straw Hats move on to trying to bandage the great elephant's wounds! But just as the whole island puts the plan into action, unseen danger lurks on horizon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and the others split up into four teams, each on different missions! Some from the Mink Tribe insist on leaving with Luffy's team! Meanwhile, Usopp makes a weapon for Nami that seems to work like magic!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's team sets out from Zou on their way to win back Sanji! But they didn't realize there is one more crewmember than they have bargained for!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Carrot stows away! And settles in with the Straw Hats as they make their way to rescue Sanji! Meanwhile, in the Sakura Kingdom, Dalton and Kureha are getting ready for the Reverie so as their former enemy in his newly-built kingdom…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: News of the raid on the Revolutionary Army reaches Luffy! But that's the least of their worries as they face a storm and a sudden lack of provisions! Meanwhile, Emperor Kaido fumes with anger at the reckless generation of upstarts!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sneaking in to the Navy island facility to replenish their food supply, Luffy and the others risk being caught out in the open! Will their infamy make them easy to spot by the hotheaded Navy recruits around them?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The jig is up as Luffy and the others make a daring dash to avoid the furious Navy! Can they escape without having to turn to fight - and after they've had a chance to raid the cabinets for food?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Making a mad dash for the Submerge with the food they stole, Luffy and the others have to get through some of the Navy's upstart soldiers! Grount, whose arm holds incredible power, summons his training to challenge Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats continue to suffer from blazing heat and a perilous food crisis! As the seas finally calm, fishing is their only hope! Meanwhile, Sanji arrives in Big Mom's territory and keeps his cool - until he sees his bride-to-be!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in danger as the venomous fish poison courses through his body! With no antidotes on board, the Straw Hats must rely on a mysterious ship for help - a ship that bears a truly surprising crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On the edge of life and death, Luffy's only hope rests with Sanji's siblings! But even though they refuse to share an antidote, they may be able to save Luffy's life yet, giving him enough energy to plunge right back into trouble.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Arriving on Cacao Island, Luffy and Chopper are in heaven as everything before their eyes is edible!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats confront Pudding - the fiancée of Sanji! But when they challenge her for Sanji's heart, her answer shocks them! Meanwhile, an ominous and mysterious message may spell doom for the Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The dangerous waters around the Whole Cake Island harbor terrifying creatures that pose a challenge for the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Mama slips into a bout of her sickness and ravages her own land in search of a specific pastry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Big Mom rampages through the Whole Cake Island in search for sweets - but when the kitchen can't prepare them fast enough, her own son steps in to curb the carnage, with deadly results.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Straw Hats draw closer to the Whole Cake Island, Pedro shares his sordid past in Big Mom's territory - and hatches a plan to win back Sanji and take an item of great worth from the Emperor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook and Pedro head out in a submersible to infiltrate Big Mom's stronghold! Meanwhile, Luffy, Nami, Chopper and Carrot head into the island chasing the image of Sanji, only to be distracted by the endless supply of sweets and a second Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Lost in the bewildering woods and chasing after Sanji, Nami and the others find there's more than meets the eye in this upside down part of the Whole Cake Island! Meanwhile, Sanji confronts his brother!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy continues to move through the mysterious and dangerous woods, unaware of the danger that lurks in the trees! Meanwhile, Sanji confronts his father as the wounds of his childhood are laid bare!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji faces off against his father in a duel! His powerful kicks aim at protecting his hands, but the Germa Family has more in store for him yet! Meanwhile, Luffy goes deeper into the Seducing Woods and falls for their powerful illusions!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda is tasked with escorting medical ships safely through Drago-Kazov space.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: When they rescue a young prince from an uprising that kills the rest of his family, Dylan and Tyr are asked to be his advisers.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan takes over a tourist barge in an attempt to escape mercenaries.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A teenage boy discovers a real-life horror scene in his home on Halloween morning; investigators must determine if the triple homicide is a random act of evil or a premeditated slaughter by someone close to the family.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After a single young mother fails to show up for work on Halloween, her family and friends suspect murder.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A military veteran is missing and a young student is murdered in what appears to be a crime of passion, but the discovery of a secret payout leads police on a wild chase.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Passions and obsessions turn toxic when a beautiful young law student is found murdered and left in a trash can, leaving police to decipher a web of boyfriends, exes and unrequited lovers.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The wife of a Marine, a pregnant dominatrix and a sex slave cross paths in a twisted tale of kidnapping, lies and murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mom does all she can to provide for her kids, including taking up with five sugar daddies to make ends meet, but when jealousy rears its ugly head, this mom winds up dead and her killer is not who you would expect.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: To keep their marriage fresh, a young couple turns to a life of sex games and sharing spouses, but when threesomes and foursomes lead to murder, investigators struggle to prove who killed this swinger.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A lover's quarrel and a quick cash scheme lead to the murder of a happy retiree; the Hollywood community is stunned when a body is found under its most famous landmark.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother becomes a murder victim while living a double life; a web of deception, sex and murder sends detectives on a multi-year hunt to figure out who could have murdered her.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A high-speed car chase ends with a 40-year-old newlywed shot dead in front of her husband and stepdaughter; is this a robbery gone wrong, a gang ordered hit, or something more sinister.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The quintessential girl next door is discovered brutally killed on Thanksgiving weekend; it would take investigators over a year to uncover the dark obsession that led to her murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los paramédicos se apresuran a la escena de un traumático accidente de carretera. El Dr. Eric Maniago ha tratado a muchos VIP, pero cuando una princesa se presenta en su sala de emergencias, se encuentra en un territorio desconocido.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los doctores están desconcertados cuando traen a un almirante retirado y no entienden lo que lo debilita cada día más.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una niña entra a la sala de emergencias y no puede moverse de la cintura para abajo. Sus padres están enojados cuando los médicos la enviaron a su casa una semana antes.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los pies de un joven han sido aplastados por un tren, y los cirujanos de urgencias tienen que trabajar muy duro para salvar su vida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La cara y el cuerpo de un hombre de repente se duplican en tamaño; un médico de urgencias se apresura a determinar por qué una mujer joven se está quemando de adentro hacia afuera después de un día en la playa.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una serpiente de cascabel mortal muerde a un hombre, pero por razones religiosas no puede recibir una transfusión de sangre. ¿Sobrevivirá?

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: When Gemma's phone is stolen, Dave and Calvin team up to get it back, only to have their mission take an unexpected turn. Also, Malcolm and Marty move into their new house.

programme.desc: When Dave discovers Calvin hasn't seen a physician in nearly a decade, he insists the Butler patriarch schedule a physical stat. But Calvin gets more than he bargained for when Dr. Fisher insists he undergo a routine colonoscopy.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Dave's amateur band loses its lead singer just before a gig, Tina offers to fill in, however her high standards are out of tune with the rest of the group. Also, Marty quickly regrets letting his needy boss, Jerry, crash at his new place.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Concerned about the safety of a treehouse Calvin's building for Grover, Dave recruits Marty to supervise covertly. Also, an innocent mistake on Malcolm's part leads to a heated bake-off between Tina and Gemma.

programme.desc: When Gemma surprises Dave with wanting another baby, he worries she's forgotten how difficult a newborn is, so he enlists a robotic doll and Marty's engineering skills to remind her.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Dr. Keller fails to report for her shift, concerned team members are shocked to discover her unconscious in her quarters. With the situation on Atlantis escalating, Woolsey is ultimately faced with a decision that could cost Keller her life.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With no recollection of how they got to the Destiny, crew members left behind over a year earlier make a mysterious return. After an unsettling turn, the memories stirred through regression therapy prove disastrous for those who’ve returned.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: In the hopes of finding something beneficial, the crew follows an energy signature that leads them to a mysterious sea of lifeless ships. With no visible signs of danger, the crew set off to take a closer look. But things may not be what they seem.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Locked in a battle with a Drone Command Ship, the Destiny is surprised by the arrival of the aliens that abducted Rush and Chloe. After Destiny's position is revealed, the crew again comes under heavy attack. But this time, they have a plan.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Excitement spreads through the ship as Eli believes he’s found a way to dial Earth. But Dr. Rush has serious reservations about abandoning Destiny, and when the crew is interrupted by a distress call, it may just change the plans of the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: While studying alien wall inscriptions on another planet, O'Neill peers into a viewer that unleashes ancient knowledge into his mind like computer virus. Can the SG-1 team reverse the process before his mind is completely reconfigured.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A black hole swallows the SG-10 team, and O'Neill is sent on a rescue mission. As the hole's pull grows stronger, it draws the Stargate toward it and soon threatens to destroy Earth. Will O'Neill find a way to stop this super-destructive force?
